currentFocus: Static RE/Ghidra closure remains unchanged; the latest chief epic source wave is accepted and pushed at a9fe757e238a237eac8aa8f7f4e12d1bad57ec60, and a source-only internal tooling vocabulary map was reconciled as context-only clean-room planning input. publicPrimaryBoundary: The public repo may track RE docs, wave notes, scratch text exports, function indexes, static maps, proof summaries, checkers, and state batons. Hard payloads, full Ghidra databases/backups, raw captures, copied executables, secrets, build output, package output, local proof paths, raw manifests, and local campaign/worktree paths remain out of tracked state.

rebuildReadiness.sourceBoundary: The checker consumes only tracked public-safe files and validates source continuity, expected counters, front-door links, fail-closed public-boundary wording, and non-claims.
rebuildReadiness.futureGate: A later readiness-gate proof needs a separate bounded assignment and must not reuse this checker as a generic gate without updating the bound source proof and expected counters.

sourceOnlyVocabularyMap.boundary: Source/internal tool names, flags, developer-menu labels, resource tags, and pipeline vocabulary are candidate terms only. Retail binary/save/runtime evidence remains higher authority before any behavior, command, importer, generated-output, runtime, rebuild, or parity claim.
sourceOnlyVocabularyMap.validation: Reconciliation passed diff whitespace, docs commands, Markdown links, repo hygiene, hard-payload safety, and public allowlist after a timeout retry.

loreAndWinuiBoundaries.lore: Lore pack fail-closed hardening is integrated but does not prove release readiness, broad ZIP package probe parity, complete traversal protection, runtime UI proof, or package publication.
loreAndWinuiBoundaries.assetLibrary: Asset Library source tests guard passive path summary and polite live-region scope, not runtime UIA/screen-reader behavior.

storageRetention.futureReviewBands: Medium and low values are non-authorized logical review ceilings only, not reclaimable storage, candidate pools, unique physical-size estimates, urgency signals, or deletion budgets.

runtimeProofBoundary.musicStatus: Music live-bundle readiness remains fail-closed and private pre-arm-only. Producer coverage or tooling availability is not live authority and not audible-output proof.
runtimeProofBoundary.onlineMultiplayer: not player-ready; Host/Join remains disabled until required distinct-endpoint command-source proof and source-bound copied-runtime causality proof are both accepted
runtimeProofBoundary.staticReClosureBoundary: Static closure is not runtime, gameplay, visual, online, rebuild, or no-noticeable-difference proof.
